overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) showing a player walking through a dystopian urban environment. The player moves from a paved city street with modern skyscrapers into a narrow dirt alleyway between dilapidated buildings, passing abandoned furniture and overgrown vegetation.

events.description: green van drives past from right to left across the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the asphalt road toward the intersection

modern high-rise building with reflective glass facade
overhead electrical wires crossing the street

segments.scene_description: The player walks along a paved urban street under an overcast sky. A green van passes by on the right as the camera approaches a crosswalk. Modern skyscrapers rise in the distance, contrasting with the gritty street-level environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: dirt path alongside residential structures with overgrown vegetation

events.description: turns right off the asphalt road onto a dirt path beside a gray house

agents.ego_description: turning off the main road onto a dirt path and walking past a residential area

single-story gray residential building with small windows
multi-colored patio umbrella shading outdoor furniture
plastic chairs and tables arranged under the umbrella

segments.scene_description: The player turns right off the paved street onto a dirt path running alongside a gray house. A colorful patio umbrella and outdoor furniture sit beside the path, with overgrown vegetation visible. The modern skyscraper remains visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow alley between industrial building and concrete retaining wall

events.description: passes under a covered walkway/stairs, entering a semi-shaded area

agents.ego_description: walking through the narrow alleyway between buildings

entered.detail: corrugated metal industrial structure with utility boxes
tall concrete wall supporting elevated ground
exterior wooden staircase leading to upper level

segments.scene_description: The player enters a narrow dirt alley between a metal industrial building on the left and a concrete retaining wall on the right. Dense overgrown vegetation lines the path. The player passes under a covered wooden staircase, briefly entering a shaded area.

scene_state.functional_zone: back alley with abandoned furniture and scattered debris

events.description: enters area with abandoned furniture and scattered debris

agents.ego_description: walking through the cluttered back alley approaching an objective area

entered.detail: discarded red sofa with debris scattered around it
trash bags, tires, and discarded items along the path

segments.scene_description: The player continues through a narrow back alley littered with abandoned furniture including a red couch and scattered debris. A dilapidated wooden house stands on the right while the metal industrial building recedes to the left. The path leads deeper into the cluttered urban wasteland.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a paved urban thoroughfare into a cluttered, dilapidated back alley. It begins on a gritty city street under an overcast sky, passing a green van as modern skyscrapers loom in the distance. As the camera turns right, the paved road gives way to a dirt path lined with overgrown vegetation and colorful patio furniture beside a gray house. The scene then shifts into a narrow corridor between a metal industrial building and a concrete wall, passing under the shadow of a covered wooden staircase. Finally, the path leads deeper into a cluttered urban wasteland, moving past a red couch and scattered debris toward a dilapidated wooden house.
